# SmartUI

- Tuya mobile UI for IoT panels & smart home; Ray & mini programs.

## 指南

- [快速开始](https://developer.tuya.com/material/cn/smartui/help-getting-started.md)
- [常见问题](https://developer.tuya.com/material/cn/smartui/faq.md)
- [主题](https://developer.tuya.com/material/cn/smartui/theme.md)
- [更新日志](https://developer.tuya.com/material/cn/smartui/help-changelog.md)

## Github Wiki

- [ConfigProvider 组件最佳实践](https://github.com/Tuya-Community/miniapp-smart-ui/wiki/ConfigProvider-%E7%BB%84%E4%BB%B6%E6%9C%80%E4%BD%B3%E5%AE%9E%E8%B7%B5)
- [如何去自定义修改SmartUI组件的样式](https://github.com/Tuya-Community/miniapp-smart-ui/wiki/%E5%A6%82%E4%BD%95%E5%8E%BB%E8%87%AA%E5%AE%9A%E4%B9%89%E4%BF%AE%E6%94%B9SmartUI%E7%BB%84%E4%BB%B6%E7%9A%84%E6%A0%B7%E5%BC%8F)

- [Battery 电池](https://developer.tuya.com/material/cn/smartui/battery.md)

- [ConfigProvider 全局配置](https://developer.tuya.com/material/cn/smartui/config-provider.md)

- [Layout 布局](https://developer.tuya.com/material/cn/smartui/col.md)

- [Grid 宫格](https://developer.tuya.com/material/cn/smartui/grid.md)
- [Sticky 粘性布局](https://developer.tuya.com/material/cn/smartui/sticky.md)
- [Tab 标签页](https://developer.tuya.com/material/cn/smartui/tab.md)

- [IndexBar 索引栏](https://developer.tuya.com/material/cn/smartui/index-bar.md)

- [Tabbar 标签栏](https://developer.tuya.com/material/cn/smartui/tabbar.md)

- [Cell 单元格](https://developer.tuya.com/material/cn/smartui/cell.md)

- [Divider 分割线](https://developer.tuya.com/material/cn/smartui/divider.md)
- [Empty 空状态](https://developer.tuya.com/material/cn/smartui/empty.md)
- [Icon 图标](https://developer.tuya.com/material/cn/smartui/icon.md)
- [Image 图片](https://developer.tuya.com/material/cn/smartui/image.md)
- [Loading 加载](https://developer.tuya.com/material/cn/smartui/loading.md)
- [NoticeBar 通知栏](https://developer.tuya.com/material/cn/smartui/notice-bar.md)
- [Overlay 遮罩层](https://developer.tuya.com/material/cn/smartui/overlay.md)
- [Skeleton 骨架屏](https://developer.tuya.com/material/cn/smartui/skeleton.md)
- [Tag 标签](https://developer.tuya.com/material/cn/smartui/tag.md)
- [Transition 动画](https://developer.tuya.com/material/cn/smartui/transition.md)

## 数据录入

- [Calendar 日历](https://developer.tuya.com/material/cn/smartui/calendar.md)
- [Cascader 级联选择](https://developer.tuya.com/material/cn/smartui/cascader.md)
- [Checkbox 复选框](https://developer.tuya.com/material/cn/smartui/checkbox.md)
- [CustomKeyboard 数字键盘](https://developer.tuya.com/material/cn/smartui/custom-keyboard.md)
- [DateTimePicker 时间选择](https://developer.tuya.com/material/cn/smartui/datetime-picker.md)
- [Field 输入框](https://developer.tuya.com/material/cn/smartui/field.md)
- [Radio 单选框](https://developer.tuya.com/material/cn/smartui/radio.md)
- [Rate 评分](https://developer.tuya.com/material/cn/smartui/rate.md)
- [Search 搜索](https://developer.tuya.com/material/cn/smartui/search.md)
- [Slider 滑动条](https://developer.tuya.com/material/cn/smartui/slider.md)
- [Stepper 步进器](https://developer.tuya.com/material/cn/smartui/stepper.md)
- [TreeSelect 分类选择](https://developer.tuya.com/material/cn/smartui/tree-select.md)

- [Dialog 弹出框](https://developer.tuya.com/material/cn/smartui/dialog.md)
- [Picker 选择器](https://developer.tuya.com/material/cn/smartui/picker.md)
- [Popover 弹出提示](https://developer.tuya.com/material/cn/smartui/popover.md)
- [Popup 弹出层](https://developer.tuya.com/material/cn/smartui/popup.md)
- [SwipeCell 滑动单元格](https://developer.tuya.com/material/cn/smartui/swipe-cell.md)
- [Switch 开关](https://developer.tuya.com/material/cn/smartui/switch.md)
- [Toast 轻提示](https://developer.tuya.com/material/cn/smartui/toast.md)
